_comment: Rust stack permission-allowlist ADDITIONS. The install concierge UNIONS permissions.allow into .claude/settings.json (on top of the base read-only set). Every command here is a safe, non-destructive dev operation: build/check/clippy/test/fmt/nextest read source and write only regenerable build output (target/); tree/metadata and the rustc/rustup entries are read-only introspection. Destructive/irreversible cargo ops (publish, install, update) are deliberately ABSENT here — they stay gated by .claude/hooks/pretooluse-safety-gates.sh (see gate-fragment.sh). Wildcard `:*` covers arguments.
